description: You are a data scientist at a market research firm. Your daily competitor price monitoring script has failed because the target e-commerce site ('GadgetWorld') updated their frontend overnight, moving from a traditional server-rendered layout to a modern component-based architecture. Refactor the extraction logic in 'scraper/parsers.py' within the project at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/shop_scraper to correctly parse the new HTML structure found in 'data/modern_product.html'. The task is complete when all tests in 'tests/test_parsers.py' pass.
